controls.title: Ensure SSH PermitRootLogin is disabled
controls.code:
control 'cis-5.2.4' do
  impact 1.0
  title 'Ensure SSH PermitRootLogin is disabled'

  describe sshd_config do
    its('PermitRootLogin') { should cmp 'no' }
  end
end

results.code_desc: SSHD Configuration PermitRootLogin is expected to cmp == "no"
results.message:
expected: no
     got: yes

(compared using `cmp` matcher)

controls.title: Ensure SSH MaxAuthTries is set to 4 or less
controls.code:
control 'cis-5.2.11' do
  impact 0.7
  title 'Ensure SSH MaxAuthTries is set to 4 or less'

  describe sshd_config do
    its('MaxAuthTries') { should cmp <= 4 }
  end
end

results.code_desc: SSHD Configuration MaxAuthTries is expected to cmp <= 4
results.message:
expected it to be <= 4
     got: 

(compared using `cmp` matcher)

controls.title: Ensure /tmp is configured
controls.code:
control 'cis-1.1.1' do
  impact 0.5
  title 'Ensure /tmp is configured'

  describe mount('/tmp') do
    it { should be_mounted }
  end
end

results.code_desc: Mount /tmp is expected to be mounted
